name: Project-Wide Dead Weight Audit
description: Systematic identification and removal of redundant files, dead code, and obsolete documentation across the entire repository.
author: Antigravity

phases.name: Audit & Inventory
phases.description: Perform recursive analysis of all directories to find unused artifacts.

phases.name: Governance & Docs Cleanup
phases.description: Prune obsolete governance scripts and documents.

phases.name: Style & UI Cleanup
phases.description: Prune unused SCSS tokens, legacy styles, and dead components.

phases.name: Test & Script Cleanup
phases.description: Prune stale tests and obsolete utility scripts.
